defectRule: PRESERVE ALL DEFECTS EXACTLY AS-IS: Do NOT fix, hide, retouch, or improve any physical defects visible in the original photo. Keep exactly as shown: wall stains, water damage marks, peeling paint, cracked paint, cracks in walls or ceilings, chipped tiles, scuff marks, yellowing, rust stains, broken fixtures. NEVER add, invent, or introduce new stains, cracks, chips, scratches, dirt, grime, or any damage that is not already visible in the original photo.
qualityFooter: ABSOLUTE FINAL RULES — no exceptions: (1) Do NOT change the camera position, angle, perspective, field of view, or focal length. (2) Do NOT alter, recolor, or add any texture, pattern, or finish to walls, floors, ceiling, tiles, or any surface — all surfaces must remain exactly as in the original. (3) Do NOT add grunge, aging, film grain, vignette, artistic filters, or decorative effects. (4) Do NOT add any new object, person, animal, shadow, or design element not already present in the original. (5) Do NOT redesign the space — this is photo editing, not interior design. (6) Remove any visible reflection of the photographer, camera, or tripod from mirrors, glass, TV screens, and appliance surfaces. (7) Preserve all existing natural and artificial lighting and all shadows exactly as in the original.

empty.кухня:
TASK: Edit this kitchen photo to show a completely empty shell — as if ready for a new owner.

REMOVE EVERY SINGLE ONE of the following items:
• ALL items on or stuck to the refrigerator surface: magnets, notes, sticky notes, drawings, children's artwork, stickers, printed photos, letters, calendars, shopping lists — the refrigerator exterior must be completely bare and clean
• All freestanding small appliances: coffee machine, kettle, toaster, blender, food processor, microwave (if not built-in)
• ALL items on every countertop: bowls, containers, bottles, jars, trays, fruit bowls, paper, boxes, plants
• All kitchen towels, dish cloths, oven mitts — anywhere they appear
• All bar stools, chairs, and seating
• All rugs, mats, anti-fatigue mats
• Curtains, blinds, and all window treatments (leave bare window frame and glass only)
• Trash cans and recycling bins
• Cleaning supplies, sprays, and brushes
• All food items, packaging, and drink containers
• All dishes, glasses, cookware, and utensils
• Any items stored on top of cabinets

KEEP ONLY these permanently built-in elements:
• Built-in kitchen cabinets and drawers
• Countertops (must be completely clear and empty)
• Built-in oven and hob integrated into cabinetry
• Panel-fitted integrated refrigerator (only if it matches the cabinetry face)
• Sink and faucet
• Fixed wall and floor tiles
• Permanently mounted ceiling and under-cabinet lighting
empty.спальня:
TASK: Edit this bedroom photo to show a completely empty shell — as if ready for a new owner.

REMOVE EVERY SINGLE ONE of the following items:
• All freestanding furniture: bed frame, mattress, divan base, headboard
• All bedding: duvet, pillows, pillow cases, mattress topper, sheets, blankets
• All freestanding wardrobes and chests of drawers not built into the wall
• All nightstands, bedside tables, desks, and chairs
• All rugs
• Curtains, blinds, shutters, and all window treatments
• ALL items on walls: framed artwork, prints, posters, family photos, mirrors (if not built-in), shelves (if not built-in)
• All wall stickers, vinyl decals, growth chart stickers
• All floor lamps, table lamps, plug-in lighting
• All plants
• All clothing, bags, shoes visible anywhere
• All personal items and toys

KEEP ONLY these permanently built-in elements:
• Built-in fitted wardrobes and closets integrated flush with the wall
• Bare window frames and glass
• Flooring, walls, ceiling (do not alter surfaces)
• Ceiling-mounted light fixtures (permanent)
• Radiators
• Electrical outlets and light switches

• All plants and planters

• Flooring, walls, ceiling (do not alter surfaces)

empty.ванная:
TASK: Edit this bathroom photo to show a completely empty shell — as if ready for a new owner.

REMOVE EVERY SINGLE ONE of the following items:
• ALL towels without exception — every towel must be removed: hanging on towel rails, on hooks, draped over shower door, on bath edge, folded on shelves, on floor — EVERY towel must be gone
• ALL toiletries from every visible surface: shampoo, conditioner, body wash, shower gel, soap bars, soap dispensers, toothbrushes, toothpaste, razors, electric shavers, cosmetics, makeup, perfume, aftershave, lotion, face cream, body cream — every bottle, tube, and container
• Toilet paper roll and spare rolls
• Toilet brush and holder
• Waste basket / rubbish bin
• Bath mat and floor rug
• Shower curtain and fabric liner (leave glass screen or metal frame if present)
• ALL items on every surface: windowsill, shelf, top of toilet cistern, bath edge, vanity top
• Candles, wax melts, reed diffusers, air fresheners
• Plants
• Any decorative items
• Towel storage baskets

KEEP ONLY these permanently fixed elements:
• Toilet fixture
• Sink and vanity unit (built-in)
• Bathtub
• Shower enclosure, glass screen, fixed glass panel
• All wall and floor tiles (do not alter)
• Built-in wall mirror (fixed to wall)
• Towel bar and ring hardware (bare metal only — no towels)
• Faucets, mixer tap, showerhead, thermostatic valve
• Built-in ceiling light and extractor fan
• Heated towel rail or radiator (bare metal fixture only — no towels)

empty.двор:
TASK: Edit this outdoor yard or garden photo to show a clean empty outdoor space.

REMOVE EVERY SINGLE ONE of the following items:
• All parked vehicles and cars
• All garden furniture: chairs, tables, benches, sun loungers
• All plant pots, containers, and potted plants
• Garden tools and equipment left out
• Children's toys and play equipment
• Trash bins and recycling containers
• Garden hoses, cables, and extension leads
• Storage boxes, sheds (if removable), and temporary structures
• Outdoor rugs and mats

KEEP these permanent landscape and structural elements:
• Buildings, walls, fences, and gates (do not alter their condition)
• Driveways and pathways (do not clean, improve, or alter their surface)
• Trees and hedges planted in the ground (permanently in-ground)
• Built-in outdoor lighting
• Fixed built structures (pergolas, permanent sheds integrated into property)
empty.дрон:
TASK: Enhance this aerial drone real estate photograph.

SKY: If the sky is overcast, grey, flat, or dull — replace it with a natural bright blue sky with realistic white clouds. The sky replacement must match the direction and angle of sunlight visible on the ground below. Ensure a seamless and natural blend at the horizon and roofline.

IMAGE QUALITY: Increase colour vibrancy and saturation moderately for an appealing but realistic look. Improve contrast and overall clarity. Remove atmospheric haze.

GROUND CONTENT: Keep absolutely all buildings, roads, vehicles, structures, trees, water features, and land features exactly as they are in original positions — do not move, add, or remove any ground-level element.

TASK: Edit this room photo to show a completely empty shell — as if ready for a new owner.

REMOVE EVERY SINGLE ONE of the following items:

• All lamps and non-permanent lighting

• All toiletries, towels, kitchen items, and consumables
• All items on every surface
• Cables and power strips

KEEP ONLY these permanently built-in structural elements:

• Radiators and heating units

declutter.кухня:
TASK: Professionally declutter and clean this kitchen photo for real estate marketing. Remove personal items and clutter only — do not redesign or add anything.

REMOVE EVERY SINGLE ONE of the following items:
• EVERYTHING on or attached to the refrigerator exterior: ALL magnets, stickers, notes, sticky notes, handwritten notes, drawings, children's artwork, printed photos, letters, to-do lists, calendars, shopping lists, paper clips — the entire fridge surface must be completely bare and clean
• All personal family photos and photo frames anywhere in the room
• Dirty dishes, pots, and pans in the sink or on counters
• Food packaging, open containers, and food scraps
• Kitchen towels and dish cloths draped over oven handle, sink, or counters
• Trash cans and recycling bins
• Cleaning products, sprays, and washing-up liquid
• Excess scattered utensils and cutlery on counters
• Clutter on top of cabinets and on every surface

KEEP — do not remove these:
• Built-in appliances, kitchen cabinets, countertops, sink
• A single neat fruit bowl or a small tidy plant already present and clean
• Neatly arranged built-in or countertop appliances that are part of the kitchen design

DO NOT add any new objects, decorations, or design elements not already in the photo.
declutter.спальня:
TASK: Professionally declutter and clean this bedroom photo for real estate marketing.

REMOVE EVERY SINGLE ONE of the following items:
• ALL personal family photo frames from every surface and wall
• All clothing from any surface: floor, chair, bed, door hooks, visible in wardrobe
• Personal items on nightstands and dressers: medications, toiletries, glasses, chargers, personal gadgets
• Children's and pet toys anywhere visible
• Cables and chargers on floor or surfaces
• Tissues, glasses, open books on bedside tables
• Clutter on dressers, desks, and windowsills

KEEP and improve:
• Bed: make it look hotel-quality — bedding perfectly smooth and wrinkle-free, pillows neatly plumped and arranged symmetrically
• Furniture in good condition and well positioned
• Healthy and tidy plants
• Neat non-personal framed artwork already hanging on walls

DO NOT add any new objects, furniture, or decorations.
declutter.гостиная:
TASK: Professionally declutter and clean this living room photo for real estate marketing.

REMOVE EVERY SINGLE ONE of the following items:
• ALL personal family photo frames and framed family photos from every surface and wall
• Children's toys and pet toys
• Scattered remote controls — leave one remote only if neatly placed
• Cables, chargers, and visible power strips
• Food and drink items, dirty dishes and glasses
• Newspapers, loose magazines, scattered papers
• Clothing and blankets left on the floor
• Clutter on coffee table, side tables, and shelves
• Items stored under furniture that are visible and messy

KEEP and improve:
• Main furniture: sofas, armchairs, coffee table (tidy the surfaces)
• TV and TV unit (minimise visible cables)
• Neatly arranged bookshelves (books tidied and organised)
• Healthy plants
• Non-personal wall art that is neatly hung
• Fold any throw blankets and drape them neatly over the arm of the sofa

DO NOT add any new objects or decorations.
declutter.ванная:
TASK: Professionally declutter and clean this bathroom photo for real estate marketing.

REMOVE EVERY SINGLE ONE of the following items:
• ALL towels without exception — every single towel must be completely removed: hanging on towel rails, on hooks, draped over shower door or glass screen, folded on shelves, on the floor, on bath edge — EVERY towel must be gone
• ALL toiletries from every visible surface without exception: shampoo, conditioner, body wash, shower gel, soap bars, liquid soap dispensers, toothbrushes, electric toothbrushes and chargers, toothpaste, razors, electric shavers, cosmetics, makeup, perfume, aftershave, lotion, face cream, body cream — every bottle, tube, and container
• Toilet paper roll and any spare rolls
• Toilet brush and holder
• Waste basket and bin
• Bath mat and floor rug
• Shower curtain if fabric (leave glass screens)
• ALL items on every surface: windowsill, shelf, top of toilet cistern, bath edge, vanity top, corner shelves
• Candles, reed diffusers, wax melts, air fresheners
• Plants and any decorative items

KEEP only permanently installed fixtures:
• Toilet, sink, bathtub, shower enclosure and glass screens
• All wall and floor tiles (do not alter)
• Built-in wall mirror
• Towel bars and rings (bare empty hardware only)
• Faucets, showerhead, and mixer
• Built-in ceiling lighting and extractor fan
• Heated towel rail (bare metal only)

All surfaces must be completely bare. The bathroom should look like a clean empty showroom display.
declutter.коридор:
TASK: Professionally declutter and clean this hallway or entryway photo for real estate marketing.

REMOVE EVERY SINGLE ONE of the following items:
• ALL shoes from the floor — the floor must be completely clear of footwear
• All bags, backpacks, and umbrellas on the floor or hooks
• Excess coats — if there are more than 2 coats, remove all; leave maximum 1–2 only if the hooks are a clear design feature of the space
• Children's items: school bags, toys, sports gear
• Clutter on surfaces, scattered mail, and papers
• Items left on the floor other than the entry rug

KEEP:
• Entryway table or console if the surface is tidy
• Clean flat entry rug
• Mirror
• Maximum 1–2 neat coats if hooks are a visible design feature

DO NOT add new objects or decorations.
